title: Accordion
description: The Accordion component provides a collapsible content panel UI, supporting single or multiple open items, custom headers, and loading states.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-accordion-group and ax-accordion-item to create collapsible panels.

sections.title: Accordion Mode
sections.description: Use the accordion input to allow only one item open at a time (accordion mode) or multiple (panel mode).

sections.title: Custom Header Template
sections.description: Customize item headers using template references for more control over the header appearance.

sections.title: Header Icon
sections.description: Add icons to accordion headers to enhance visual appeal and provide better context.

sections.title: Loading
sections.description: Show loading states for accordion items to provide feedback during data fetching or processing.

props.name: activeIndex
props.description: Index of the active item(s). Supports two-way binding.

props.name: collapsedOnItemClick
props.description: Whether to collapse items when clicked (default: true).

events.name: activeIndexChange
events.description: Emitted when the active index changes (two-way binding).

props.name: isCollapsed
props.description: Collapsed state of the item. Supports two-way binding.

props.name: isLoading
props.description: Show loading state for the item. Supports two-way binding.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Emitted when the header is clicked.

methods.content:
/**
 * Opens the accordion item (sets isCollapsed to false).
 */
open(): void

/**
 * Closes the accordion item (sets isCollapsed to true).
 */
close(): void

/**
 * Toggles the accordion item state (opens if closed, closes if open).
 */
toggle(): void

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 * Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
*
* @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
*/
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 * Inherited from MXBaseComponent.
*
* @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
*/
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void
